assetChat.welcome:
Hello! 👋 I'm your **AI Assistant** expert in the PONTUS-X ecosystem. 🌐

I'm analyzing the asset **"{{assetName}}"** to answer your questions precisely.

What would you like to know about this dataset?
assetChat.title: Ask the AI Assistant
assetChat.errorIdentify: Error: Could not identify the asset
assetChat.errorGeneric: ❌ Sorry, there was an error processing your query. Please try again.

concierge.welcome: Hello! 👋 I'm your **AI Assistant** from ProcureData. I can help you with information about services, pricing, sustainability and blockchain technology. How can I help you?
concierge.title: AI Assistant
concierge.subtitle: ProcureData Assistant
concierge.errorGeneric: Sorry, an error occurred. Please try again. 😔
concierge.feedbackThanksDescription: Your feedback helps us improve the assistant 🚀
concierge.feedbackSentDescription: We'll review this response to improve the assistant 📝
concierge.feedbackQuestion: How should the assistant have responded?

federated.description: Ask about federated data spaces, data sovereignty, Gaia-X or ProcureData capabilities.
federated.placeholder: Ask about the federated data space...
federated.q1: What is a federated data space?
federated.q4: How does it integrate with my ERP?
federated.errorRateLimit: ⚠️ Rate limit reached. Please try again in a moment.
federated.errorCredits: ⚠️ AI credits exhausted. Contact the administrator.
federated.errorGeneric: Sorry, an error occurred. Please try again.
federated.errorConnection: Connection error. Check your network and try again.

successStory.description: Ask about {{company}}'s case, their challenge, solution or services used.
successStory.q4: How does this apply to my sector?
successStory.errorRateLimit: ⚠️ Rate limit reached. Please try again in a moment.
successStory.errorCredits: ⚠️ AI credits exhausted. Contact the administrator.
successStory.errorGeneric: Sorry, an error occurred. Please try again.
successStory.errorConnection: Connection error. Check your network and try again.

guard.warning1: ⚠️ Your message has been identified as potentially inappropriate. Please rephrase your query constructively.
guard.warning2: ⚠️ This is a second warning. If you continue sending inappropriate messages, the AI messaging service will be suspended for this session.
guard.blocked: 🚫 The AI messaging service has been temporarily suspended due to inappropriate use. Reload the page to try again, or contact support if you believe this is an error.
guard.tooLong: The message exceeds the 2000 character limit. Please shorten your query.
guard.invalidContent: Your message contains disallowed content. Please use the chat for ProcureData-related queries.
